listing.name: LaunchForge AI
listing.description: A marketplace launch strategist for Swarms creators that turns raw AI product ideas into structured launch packages with buyer positioning, listing copy, use cases, demo prompts, payload drafts, and quality validation.

use_cases.title: Create marketplace listings from raw ideas
use_cases.description: Turn a brief AI product idea into a complete Swarms Marketplace listing.

use_cases.title: Prepare prompt and agent payload drafts
use_cases.description: Generate structured payload drafts for prompt and agent submissions.

use_cases.title: Audit listing quality before launch
use_cases.description: Flag vague positioning, weak buyer pain, missing examples, risky claims, and metadata gaps.
